title: Windmannia lentiscifolia

It is valued for its potential health benefits, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, as well as its ability to support respiratory health and alleviate symptoms of digestive issues. taxonomy: Windmannia lentiscifolia is a species of flowering plant. It belongs to the family Hamamelidaceae.
